There are a few main developers of OpenLieroX, namely Karel, Pelya and Albert (sorry if this is not up-to-date or someone else feels he should also stand here -- please just add yourself then). There are/were much more people involved into the whole [[Development|development process]]. Read [[OpenLieroX|the main OpenLieroX article]] for some more details. About how we communicate and how you can contact us, read [[Development#communication|Development#Communication]]. Best way is to leave a mail at [mailto:openlierox-devel@lists.sourceforge.net openlierox-devel@lists.sourceforge.net].

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721122806/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Developers -->
